params.name: Pear Basket
params.source: Upgrading Kiddo Kong Rong to T9 in [[Cathay Generals]].
params.description: This basket produced in Shandong can greatly extend the shelf life of pears. As a pear enthusiast, Kong Rong knew that moderate-sized pears are the freshest and sweetest. Therefore, he was always "kind" enough to share the larger pears with his family so he can enjoy the tasty ones alone.
